__fixture__.name: gutter_lane_catalog
__fixture__.scenario: The editor gutter publishes canonical lanes, signal admission, precedence, hit-target, accessibility, and no-jitter rules before feature implementations add markers.

lane_definitions.owns_summary: Line position, current-line orientation, and stable digit reserve.
lane_definitions.must_never_own: Breakpoint toggles, diagnostic severity, or semantic truth.

lane_definitions.owns_summary: Breakpoints, logpoints, disabled breakpoint state, current frame, stopped frame, and debug execution cues.
lane_definitions.must_never_own: Diagnostic severity, quick-fix application, or fold disclosure.

lane_definitions.owns_summary: Diagnostic severity markers, clustered problem counts, freshness disclosure, and line-local diagnostic detail entry.
lane_definitions.must_never_own: Breakpoint hit targets or diagnostic-provider truth.

lane_definitions.owns_summary: VCS change bars, merge/conflict markers, review anchors, comment anchors, and change-family summaries.
lane_definitions.must_never_own: Diagnostic severity or current-frame execution state.

lane_definitions.owns_summary: Fold availability, collapsed fold affordances, and hidden-range summaries.
lane_definitions.must_never_own: The only disclosure for hidden diagnostics, conflicts, review anchors, or execution state.

lane_definitions.owns_summary: Blame, coverage, test, collaboration, generated-lineage, freshness, and other low-urgency context cues.
lane_definitions.must_never_own: Primary execution, diagnostic, change, fold, or stable text-column budget.

signal_admission_rules.accepted_when: Line numbers are enabled for the viewport and digit reserve is computed at viewport or document scope.
signal_admission_rules.rejected_when: Line numbers are disabled by user or renderer policy.

signal_admission_rules.accepted_when: The cue orients the active line without overpowering diagnostics or selection.
signal_admission_rules.rejected_when: The cue would hide diagnostic, selection, or execution state.

signal_admission_rules.accepted_when: A breakpoint authority ref and toggle command are available.
signal_admission_rules.rejected_when: The marker lacks debug authority or cannot be reached by keyboard.

signal_admission_rules.accepted_when: The debug session reports a stopped current frame mapped to this line.
signal_admission_rules.rejected_when: The frame mapping is unknown and no inspectable fallback label is available.

signal_admission_rules.accepted_when: A diagnostic cluster or producer ref exists and severity/freshness can be announced.
signal_admission_rules.rejected_when: The marker cannot cite diagnostic authority or severity.

signal_admission_rules.accepted_when: A diagnostic cluster or producer ref exists and severity/freshness can be announced.
signal_admission_rules.rejected_when: The marker cannot cite diagnostic authority or severity.

signal_admission_rules.accepted_when: A VCS or diff authority ref exists.
signal_admission_rules.rejected_when: The marker is decorative only or cannot cite change authority.

signal_admission_rules.accepted_when: A review/comment anchor ref exists and opens through the review route.
signal_admission_rules.rejected_when: The marker cannot cite a review anchor or reachable route.

signal_admission_rules.accepted_when: The folding model owns the range and hidden high-severity state can be summarized.
signal_admission_rules.rejected_when: The fold range is stale or cannot disclose hidden diagnostics/conflicts.

signal_admission_rules.accepted_when: Coverage result has a detail route and does not displace higher-priority lanes.
signal_admission_rules.rejected_when: Coverage cannot preserve detail after collapse.

signal_admission_rules.accepted_when: A test result ref exists and a line detail route can preserve it.
signal_admission_rules.rejected_when: The marker would hide execution, diagnostic, change, or fold state.

signal_admission_rules.accepted_when: Blame detail exists and collapses before primary lanes are harmed.
signal_admission_rules.rejected_when: Blame is the only cue and adds no actionable or interpretive value in the current mode.

signal_admission_rules.accepted_when: Never by default; it must first be restated as a known signal family with user value.
signal_admission_rules.rejected_when: The cue is ornamental, color-only, lacks authority, or cannot preserve no-jitter behavior.

precedence_rules.when_signals_compete: A breakpoint, logpoint, or current-frame cue and one or more diagnostics appear on the same line.
precedence_rules.winning_lane_or_signal: Execution/debug owns its lane and diagnostics own the diagnostic lane; a current frame wins the primary execution slot over an ordinary breakpoint.
precedence_rules.losing_signal_handling: No losing family disappears. Same-line compact fallback preserves both in the accessible name and line detail.
precedence_rules.accessible_name_requirement: The line name lists execution state first, then breakpoint/logpoint state, then dominant diagnostic severity and count.

precedence_rules.when_signals_compete: A fold affordance and execution/debug signal appear on the same line.
precedence_rules.winning_lane_or_signal: Execution/debug remains the primary interactive lane; fold remains separate when width permits.
precedence_rules.losing_signal_handling: If the fold target hides for width, the fold state moves to line detail and keyboard fold commands while staying in the accessible name.
precedence_rules.accessible_name_requirement: The line name includes current frame or breakpoint state plus expanded/collapsed fold state.

precedence_rules.when_signals_compete: Diagnostic, execution, conflict, review, or fold state competes with blame, coverage, test, collaboration, generated, or freshness cues.
precedence_rules.winning_lane_or_signal: High-severity or action-bearing lanes stay visible; supplemental cues collapse first.
precedence_rules.losing_signal_handling: Collapsed supplemental cues preserve family names and source refs in line detail.
precedence_rules.accessible_name_requirement: The line name includes hidden supplemental families when they affect interpretation.
